arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reacts to Man Utd 1 FC Twente 1
arts.sum: You have to be consistent and keep going in the second half, we dropped the level and gave the goal away. "The goal, it’s [a] team [mistake], a player of Twente can dribble through almost the whole pitch, or half the pitch, without stopping.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag and Christian Eriksen criticise Man United’s desire in Twente draw
arts.sum: Eriksen was involved at both ends as Manchester United began their Europa League campaign with a 1-1 draw at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag slams Manchester United players in critical analysis of Twente draw
arts.sum: Man United drew for the third time in eight games this season as FC Twente recovered from 1-0 down to gain a point in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Why Man Utd decided not to sign Ivan Toney and Victor Osimhen
arts.sum: ESPN claim that over the last couple of years, the club were alerted to Toney while at Brentford and Osimhen when he was in scintillating form for Napoli. Manchester United harboured reservations over Ivan Toney and Victor Osimhen which led to them abandoning pursuits for the strikers, a report has revealed.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 1-1 Twente: Player ratings as Europa League campaign begins with draw
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag slightly rotated for the visit of his beloved boyhood club, but was still able to call upon a strong side with places for Manuel Ugarte, Christian Eriksen, Harry Maguire and Amad Diallo. The hosts had a lot of the ball in the early stages without fashioning anything particularly dangerous, with Twente goalkeeper Lars Unnerstall first called into action 25 minutes in to parry what would have been a spectacular own goal from Mees Hilgers.

arts.ttl: Christian Eriksen says FC Twente 'looked like they wanted it more' after holding Man United to a point in the Europa League - as he admits setback 'feels like a loss'
arts.sum: United's European campaign got off to a sluggish start at Old Trafford on Wednesday night after Sam Lammers cancelled out Eriksen's opener.

arts.ttl: Man United let lead slip in home draw with Twente
arts.sum: Manchester United began their Europa League campaign with a 1-1 draw after they were held by FC Twente at a rainy Old Trafford on Wednesday, with a goal from Christian Eriksen being cancelled out by Dutch striker Sam Lammers.

arts.ttl: Man United vs. Twente player ratings: Fernandes struggles as Hilgers impresses
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides player ratings from Manchester United's 1-1 draw with FC Twente in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup fourth-round draw in full as Man Utd, Liverpool and Arsenal discover fate
arts.sum: The draw for the fourth round of the Carabao Cup has been completed, with Manchester United, Manchester City and Chelsea among the clubs to learn their fate for the October fixtures

arts.ttl: Man United 1-1 Twente PLAYER RATINGS: Christian Eriksen had a game of two halves but wh was like a young Neymar? And which new signing is sure to become a fan favourite?
arts.sum: DOMINIC HOGAN: Christian Eriksen had a game of two halves scoring a stunner in the first half for United, before making an awful error which led to FC Twente's equaliser.
